typecheck.command: xcodebuild build-for-testing -project OpenBurnBar.xcodeproj -scheme OpenBurnBar -destination "platform=macOS,arch=arm64" -clonedSourcePackagesDirPath .spm-cache -derivedDataPath .derived-data/ci-typecheck CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO CODE_SIGNING_REQUIRED=NO

blockingIssues.description: missionDispatchPacket invokes reviewRunLauncher before store-level approval/terminal guards are checked, so unapproved/terminal missions can still launch daemon-managed runs before dispatch is rejected.

appliedUpdates.description: Added .factory/library/mission-control-m6-known-behaviors.md to document current daemon behavior where mission.approve outside awaiting_approval does not reject and mission.cancel has no terminal-state guard.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Strengthen handoff enforcement by requiring a mandatory pre-EndFeatureRun commit verification transcript entry (`git rev-parse --verify <commitId>` and `git show --name-only <commitId>`) and failing handoff when commitId does not resolve.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviewer found reported commitId `06c1a2a3e0b89c74f5d6e1a3b7c9f2d8e5a4b6c1` did not resolve in git, while actual commit was `06c1a2a30124ed4468e0ab33904a38ffbe0d3259`.
